name: BambooHR
description: BambooHR HRIS platform. Manage employee records, the company directory, time-off requests, and reports via the BambooHR REST API.

credential_fields.name: apiKey
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: BambooHR API key (generate from your profile menu > API Keys in BambooHR).

credential_fields.name: password
credential_fields.label: Password
credential_fields.description: BambooHR ignores the basic-auth password — enter the literal value 'x'.

tools.name: get_employee_directory
tools.description: Retrieve the company employee directory: every active employee's display name, job title, department, work email, and contact info. Note: the directory must be enabled for your account.

tools.name: get_employee
tools.description: Retrieve a single employee record by ID. Specify which fields to return via the 'fields' query parameter (comma-separated).

id.description: Employee ID, or 'me' for the authenticated user.

fields.description: Comma-separated field aliases to return (e.g. 'firstName,lastName,workEmail,department,hireDate'). Required by BambooHR.

tools.name: create_employee
tools.description: Create a new employee. Returns 201 Created with the new employee's ID in the Location header. firstName and lastName are required.

tools.name: update_employee
tools.description: Update an existing employee record. Only the fields supplied in the body are changed.

tools.name: list_time_off_requests
tools.description: List time-off requests, optionally filtered by date range, employee, type, status, or action.

tools.name: create_time_off_request
tools.description: Create a new time-off request on behalf of an employee.

timeOffTypeId.description: Time-off type ID (look up with list_time_off_types).

amount.description: Amount of time off (in the type's units, e.g. days or hours).

tools.name: list_time_off_types
tools.description: List the time-off types configured for the company (e.g. Vacation, Sick, Personal) including their IDs needed to create requests.

tools.name: list_who_is_out
tools.description: Return the list of employees scheduled to be out (time off or holidays) within a given date range. Defaults to today through 14 days out if no range is given.

tools.name: list_fields
tools.description: List every field defined on the employee record, including standard and custom fields, with their aliases needed for get_employee/update_employee.

tools.name: get_company_report
tools.description: Run a saved company report by ID and return the result. Set format to 'JSON' for structured output.

format.description: Output format: 'JSON', 'CSV', 'XLS', 'PDF'. Defaults to 'JSON' for API access.

fd.description: Set to 'no' to suppress field-display headers in tabular output.
